exercises.code:
print('unit', 'entity_pair')
print('target', 'needs_review_7d')
print('horizon', 7)

y = [0, 1, 0, 0]
print('prevalence', sum(y) / len(y))
print('n', len(y))
print('pos', sum(y))

t = 'needs_review_7d'
print('ok', 'fraud' not in t)
print('target', t)
print('policy', 'review_not_fraud')

y = [1, 1, 0]
maj = 1 if y.count(1) >= y.count(0) else 0
print('maj', maj)
print('acc', sum(yi == maj for yi in y) / len(y))
print('n', len(y))

x, y = [0, 1, 2], [0, 1, 0]
p = [1 if xi >= 1 else 0 for xi in x]
print('acc', sum(a == b for a, b in zip(p, y)) / len(y))
print('preds', p)
print('keep_rule', True)

print('cost', 2 * 1 + 1 * 5)
print('fp', 2)
print('fn', 1)

import math
p = 1 / (1 + math.exp(-0.2))
print('prob', round(p, 3))
print('pred', int(p >= 0.5))
print('thr', 0.5)

w = [1, 2]
print('l2', sum(x * x for x in w))
print('n', len(w))
print('ok', True)

c = {'x': 0.1, 'y': -0.5, 'z': 0.2}
print(sorted(c, key=lambda k: abs(c[k]), reverse=True))
print('top', 'y')
print('causal', False)

print('scaled', True)
print('assume', 'log_odds_linear')
print('ok', True)

w = 0.8
print('sign', 'pos' if w > 0 else 'neg')
print('w', w)
print('causal', False)

X = [0.1, 0.4]
print([1 if x >= 0.3 else 0 for x in X])
print('thr', 0.3)
print('ok', True)

preds = [[1, 0], [1, 1], [0, 1]]
out = []
for j in range(2):
    col = [preds[i][j] for i in range(3)]
    out.append(1 if sum(col) >= 2 else 0)
print('vote', out)
print('n_models', 3)
print('ok', True)

y = [0, 1, 1]; pred = [0, 1, 0]; maj = 1
print('stump', sum(p == t for p, t in zip(pred, y)) / 3)
print('dummy', sum(t == maj for t in y) / 3)
print('ok', True)

d = [1, 4, 8]; v = [0.5, 0.7, 0.65]
i = max(range(3), key=lambda j: v[j])
print('depth', d[i])
print('valid', v[i])
print('seed', 7)

tr, va = 0.95, 0.6
print('overfit', tr - va > 0.2)
print('gap', round(tr - va, 2))
print('ok', True)

import random
random.seed(1)
print([random.randint(0, 9) for _ in range(3)])
print('seed', 1)
print('repro', True)

import json
m = {'pr_auc': 0.6, 'rule': 0.5}
print(json.dumps(m, sort_keys=True))
print('beats', m['pr_auc'] > m['rule'])
print('run', 'r1')

fields = ['run_id', 'feature_set', 'model', 'params', 'metrics']
print(fields)
print('n', len(fields))
print('ok', True)

print('beats_dummy', 0.55 > 0.5)
print('model', 0.55)
print('dummy', 0.5)

f = [0.4, 0.6, 0.5]
print(round(sum(f) / len(f), 3))
print('n', len(f))
print('ok', True)

s = [{'name': 'A', 'fn': 2}, {'name': 'B', 'fn': 5}]
print(max(s, key=lambda x: x['fn'])['name'])
print('fn', 5)
print('ok', True)

ents = ['e1', 'e1', 'e2']
print('n_groups', len(set(ents)))
print('n_rows', len(ents))
print('ok', True)
